ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearance by on on behalf of the Plaintiffs and notice having been given, the Court Ordered Case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608 (b).Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2017 Continued To Nov-14-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by self-represented Plaintiff, Malinka Moye. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Nov-14-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610) On Aug-17-2018 per Order of Judge A. James Robertson, II a monetary sanction order of $400.00 for failure of Self-represented Plaintiff William Warren to appear on August 15, 2017 Order to Show Cause is issued. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Continued To Aug-15-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: William Warren appearing on his own behalf. No appearance by Self-represented Plaintiff Malinka Moye. Plaintiff Malinka Moye is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to August 15, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: A James Robertson, III; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Plaintiffs William Warren and Malinka Moye are each sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Mar-07-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. If no appearance is made on Mar-07-2017, the court intends to dismiss the case. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Payable Unto City And County Of Sf. Judgment As Matter Of Law. $3,000,000.00. Judgment Form Jud-100 To Be Filed. Money. Due. Unto Budgets Of City Of Sf & Judicial Council Of California
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiffs MALINKA MOYE (Tel No. 415-867-0743) and WILLIAM WARREN (Tel No. 415-850-1856) appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Plaintiffs do not contest the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF MALINKA MOYE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Payable Unto City And County Of SF; Judgment As Matter Of Law; $3,000,000.00; Judgment Form Jud-100 To Be Filed; Money; Due; Unto Budgets Of City Of SF & Judicial Council Of California, Plaintiff Malinka Moye's motion for summary judgment is denied without prejudice to his refiling a motion for summary judgment that complies with the applicable rules. This motion does not. First, there is no proof that the motion was served on the defendants. Second, the defendants were just served in this case on February 3, 2016 and thus this motion is premature. Code of Civil Procedure 437c(a) provides that "The motion may be made at any time after 60 days have elapsed since the general appearance in the action or proceeding of each party against whom the motion is directed or at any earlier time after the general appearance that the court, with or without notice and upon good cause shown, may direct." Third, the motion does not include a separate statement of undisputed facts as required by Code of Civil Procedure 437c and California Rule of Court 3.1350(h). Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
